title: The world wants to know what is happening in HK

Maybe lack of promotions on twitter, we should start up more useful post here to build credibility first, then spread the channel in Twitter to let world users know we have a new channel.

Seeing a post outside worries about the World channel would become a Black Hole channel in English. I know it’s hard to avoid but please try our best to push useful post here, at the same time just shed more lights on Twitter. Heung Gong Yan Ga Yau!!
